name: Computer Science
description: Explore the world of computing, algorithms, and software development. Our state-of-the-art labs and expert faculty prepare you for the tech industry.

name: Physics
description: Delve into the fundamental principles of the universe. From quantum mechanics to astrophysics, build a strong foundation in theoretical and experimental physics.

name: Chemistry
description: Discover the properties of matter and chemical reactions. Our comprehensive program includes organic, inorganic, and physical chemistry with extensive lab work.

name: Mathematics
description: Develop strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Our curriculum covers pure and applied mathematics, statistics, and operational research.

name: Commerce
description: Master the principles of business, finance, and economics. Prepare for a successful career in corporate management, accounting, or entrepreneurship.

name: English Literature
description: Explore classic and contemporary literature, enhance your critical thinking, and master the art of communication and creative writing.
